channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: Nutlope /hallmark | CSS | N/A
item.description: Anti-AI-slop design skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.

item.title: malisper /pgrust | Rust | N/A
item.description: Postgres rewritten in Rust, now passing 100% of the Postgres regression tests

item.title: davila7 /claude-code-templates | Python | N/A
item.description: CLI tool for configuring and monitoring Claude Code

item.title: chen08209 /FlClash | Dart | N/A
item.description: A multi-platform proxy client based on ClashMeta,simple and easy to use, open-source and ad-free.

item.title: k1tbyte /Wand-Enhancer | C# | N/A
item.description: Advanced UX and interoperability extension for Wand (WeMod) app

item.title: ColeMurray /background-agents | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: An open-source background agents coding system

item.title: Crosstalk-Solutions /project-nomad | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.

item.title: home-assistant /core | Python | N/A
item.description: 🏡 Open source home automation that puts local control and privacy first.

item.title: anthropics /claude-cookbooks | Jupyter Notebook | N/A
item.description: A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.

item.title: Shubhamsaboo /awesome-llm-apps | Python | N/A
item.description: 100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.

item.title: PrefectHQ /prefect | Python | N/A
item.description: Prefect is a workflow orchestration framework for building resilient data pipelines in Python.

item.title: wonderwhy-er /DesktopCommanderMCP | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities

item.title: Dicklesworthstone /destructive_command_guard | Rust | N/A
item.description: The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being executed by agents.
